notes:
### v1.1.4

#### Added
- Auto-detect LOA Logs executable and 'Start with LOA Logs' option (UI + backend + startup auto-launch).

#### Fixed
- Immutable raid settings updates and sequential backend saves to prevent cross-row mutations and race conditions in raid settings UI.
- Bugfix: changing one raid's difficulty no longer affects other raids for the same character (deep-clone raid_configs and scoped updates).
- Lost Ark monitoring improvements: broader process name matching and added debug logging to diagnose monitoring/startup behavior.
- Backend: session tracking and raid gate progress fixes (Bugs 1-5 resolved).

#### Improved
- Startup behavior: will attempt to start LOA Logs on app startup when configured; Lost Ark monitoring can be enabled at startup.

## Installation
Download `loatracker_1.1.4_x64-setup.exe` below.
